text.title: PM Certification Alignment 2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.root-cause: actual weighting deviates >5pp from new ECO

antipattern.symptom: ECO tasks have no mapped content units.
antipattern.root-cause: any ECO task with 0 unit links
antipattern.fix: Author content unit or import from external.

antipattern.symptom: Mock exams still draw from pre-2026 item-bank distribution.
antipattern.fix: Rebalance bank tag mix to ECO.
